articles.title: Bitcoin Looks To Retake $20,000 As Ether, XRP, Cardano Traders Bank On A Massive Bull Run
articles.description: After an epic battle for control at the beginning of January, Bitcoin bulls managed to topple bears this week, with the price soaring past $18,000 on Dec 12 for the first time since mid-December.

articles.title: Alameda liquidators get liquidated on Aave as they try to consolidate funds
articles.description: Alameda liquidators were liquidated for $73,000 on Aave as they attempted to withdraw funds from the platform by removing the collateral first.

articles.title: Polygon eyes hard fork in January to address reorgs and gas fee spikes: Exclusive
articles.description: The developers at Polygon PoS blockchain have proposed to launch a network hard fork on Jan. 17.

articles.title: Ukraine Bank Finds Stellar Blockchain Brings ‘Key Advantages’
articles.description: A two-year study from TASCOMBANK, for the most part, adds a Stellar splash of fuel to the developing crypto economy of Ukraine

articles.title: Shiba Inu Takes No. 2 Spot In Most Secure Crypto Projects – A Boost For SHIB Price?
articles.description: In a digitized economy, security is one way to ensure that your digital assets are safe. Shiba Inu was recently examined by security analysis company CertiK. According to a recent tweet, the memecoin ecosystem ranked No. 2 in its Security Leaderboard with a score of 93, only behind Polygon which has a score of 95. […]
